data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Data transmission is secured using strong encryption protocols to prevent interception.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust mechanisms are in place to mitigate Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducting frequent security audits to find vulnerabilities proactively.
data.technical_spec: Automated vulnerability scanners and manual penetration tests

data.title: Access Management
data.description: Strict access policies and protocols for users and administrators to mitigate unauthorized access.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: A comprehensive incident response plan is in place to quickly address security breaches.
